\section*{subtitle: }

Hi, my name is Dohyung Kim. I am currently studying toward a PhD degree in Electrical and Electronic Engineering at Yonsei University in Seoul, under supervsion of Prof, \href{http://cvlab-yonsei.github.io}{Bumsub Ham}.

\subsection*{Research interest}

	- Network Quantization
	- Image Matching
	- Super-resolution
	- Network Distillation
